commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): create .claude.json to prevent auth re-confirmation

Add creation of ~/.claude/.claude.json in postCreateCommand.
Without this file, Claude Code treats the environment as a new
installation and requests re-authentication on every container rebuild.

Refs #8

commit.message:
Implement token conservation and stability improvements

Token Conservation:
- Add token-aware conversation history retrieval (HistoryConfig)
- Replace hard 20-message limit with configurable token budget
- Cache prompt section text to avoid double-building

Stability & Security:
- Improve FTS5 query escaping (filter operators, additional chars)
- Add session state tracker cleanup loop (prevents memory leak)
- Fix message_sync deadlock risk in IncrementalSync

Performance:
- Extract prompt scaling constants to PromptScalingConfig
- Add joinSectionsWithCache for efficient section assembly

Add EARS requirement parser, steering documents, and RPI workflow templates

EARS (Easy Approach to Requirements Syntax) parser converts natural-language
requirements into structured types for spec-driven development. Steering
documents (STEERING.md, REQUIREMENTS.md) are auto-injected into agent system
prompts. Three workflow templates added: Research-Plan-Implement, Code Review,
and Deep Research pipelines.

- New openfang-types::ears module with 6 EARS patterns + freeform fallback
- PromptContext gains steering_md and requirements_md fields
- Kernel reads STEERING.md/REQUIREMENTS.md from agent workspaces
- WorkflowTemplates::rpi(), code_review(), deep_research() builders
- API: POST /api/ears/parse, GET /api/workflows/templates,
  POST /api/workflows/templates/instantiate
- 17 new tests (2112 total), zero clippy warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: independent admin auth system with weekly password rotation

Backend:
- AdminCredential DB model (email, passwordHash) seeded with initial credentials
- POST /admin-auth/login: validates against ADMIN_EMAIL env + AdminCredential hash, returns 8h JWT signed with ADMIN_JWT_SECRET
- GET /admin-auth/me: verify admin token
- POST /admin-auth/reset-password: change admin password (admin token required)
- adminJwt middleware: validates Bearer token with ADMIN_JWT_SECRET + scope:admin check
- All /admin/* routes now use adminJwt instead of user-based adminOnly middleware
- Weekly password rotation job (node-cron): every Monday 09:00 Istanbul time, generates 16-char password, hashes, saves to DB, emails via Resend

Frontend:
- /admin/login: dark red theme, email+password form, saves adminToken cookie (8h)
- /admin/reset-password: current+new+confirm password, calls /admin-auth/reset-password
- /admin page: reads adminToken cookie, redirects to /admin/login if missing/invalid, logout clears adminToken

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v82: sync from capital-energy (CRM tap-through, drop call, OTD fixes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Latin language support with Church Latin conventions (#4)

* Add Latin (Ecclesiastical/Church) language support

- Remove German-only gate in CLI, allow --language la
- Create la_standard.yaml rules for Church Latin singing conventions
  (Classical→Ecclesiastical corrections: w→v, softened c/g before front vowels)
- Make LLM IPA prompt language-aware with per-language convention descriptions
- Add before_front_vowel/before_back_vowel position types to rules engine
- Add Latin IPA symbol descriptions (tʃ, dʒ, ɲ) to glossary
- Fix hardcoded German error message in language validation
- Add tests for Latin through both espeak and LLM backends

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DBHYwmKm7wapdur4DvPCzk

* Fix Latin ae/oe diphthongs and glossary false-positive symbols

- Add ae→[ɛ] and oe→[e] substitution rules for Ecclesiastical Latin
  (espeak outputs Classical diphthongs [aɪ]/[ɔɪ] which Church Latin
  monophthongizes)
- Fix glossary symbol collection to mask multi-char symbols before
  checking single-char components (prevents ʃ appearing when only tʃ
  is in output, and ʒ appearing when only dʒ is present)
- Add test for multi-char symbol masking in glossary

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DBHYwmKm7wapdur4DvPCzk

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add 5 case study template variants with shared content interface (DEF-6)

New template system for case studies with a shared CaseStudyContent interface
and accent color system. Each template offers a distinct layout philosophy:

1. CinematicScrollTemplate — full-viewport hero, filmstrip gallery, timeline
2. MagazineEditorialTemplate — asymmetric grid hero, pull quotes, masonry gallery
3. TechnicalDossierTemplate — numbered sections, data tables, contact sheet grid
4. NarrativeCascadeTemplate — continuous flow, sticky mockup, interspersed gallery
5. EvidenceFirstTemplate — inverted order (impact first), before/after comparison

Includes VideoReel placeholder component, Monash sample data, and preview pages
at /preview/{cinematic-scroll,magazine-editorial,technical-dossier,narrative-cascade,evidence-first}.

commit.message:
Make calibration the dominant ranking factor (~43% of max score)

Remove pullback mega-bonus (+5 AND 1.15x multiplier) — the single biggest
score distorter that let gray/red-heat stocks outrank GREEN signals. Zero
noise components (accel, consistency, FVG). Halve SMA proximity and squeeze.
Add computeComboHeatBonus() so hot/cold combos directly affect score (±6.0).
Increase signal bonus scale (edge×1.5, cap 10.0, YELLOW 35%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix debut cycles being stripped by consecutive-duplicate dedup

The dedup pass excluded intro/listening/component_intro from removal but
not debut. When a component_practice had the same text as its parent LEGO
(common for M-LEGOs), the debut was treated as a duplicate and silently
removed — causing 49 rounds to fail validation in the Italian course.

Add 'debut' to the dedup exclusion list since it's a structural cycle
that must never be removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Post-launch polish: type fixes, light mode removal, font loading, footer redesign

- DEF-28: Fix Globe3D TypeScript ref type error with type assertion
- DEF-29: Install @types/google.maps for Map.tsx
- DEF-30: Fix PremiumPathwaysFinder icon prop types (ElementType → ComponentType)
- DEF-21: Remove ~150 lines of dead light-mode CSS, simplify ThemeContext to dark-only
- DEF-24: Add DM Sans to Google Fonts import (was declared but never loaded)
- Footer: redesign with hover:underline links, cleaner layout
- Navigation: remove light-mode conditional branches
- Minor: fix hover states, reduce dead code in HomeV3 and MonashCaseStudy

commit.message:
merge: trajectory engine V0.2 tree branching implementation (87 tests passing)

V0.2 adds replay-based tree branching on top of V0's parallel rollout:
- ReplayCache: cache pilot responses for prefix reuse in branch runs
- tree_rollout: pilot run + branch runs at each turn point
- Monitor replay support for cached turn injection
- AgentPipe graceful degradation (allow_partial)
- Three-round validation script (Smoke/Replay/Multi-prompt)
- Visualization support for V0.2 tree schema

Real validation results (vLLM + OrchRL Search MAS):
- 238 turns, 39 episodes, 100% replay marker correctness
- ~25% prefix sharing rate, reward diversity confirmed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(auth): add channel membership on invite acceptance

The auth callback created team_members but never called
addToTeamChannels(), leaving invited coaches without access
to any message channels. The layout self-healing was skipped
because team_members already existed (!activeTeam was false).

- Add addToTeamChannels() call in auth callback after
  team_members upsert
- Add channel membership repair in app layout that runs
  even when activeTeam exists (one-time fix for existing
  users missing channel_members)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

revert: remove styles.xml/sheetFormatPr restoration that corrupted Excel files

Reverts to 5e236ab (the working version). The xl/styles.xml and
sheetFormatPr wholesale restoration broke Excel file layouts because
ExcelJS reassigns style indices when adding images/cells, and
replacing styles.xml with the original caused index mismatches.

Column width preservation via <cols> XML restoration remains intact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

success

commit.message:
Fix artifact content overflow in session detail (#194)

## Summary
- Add `overflow-hidden` to `ScrollArea` in `ArtifactContent` so
`max-h-[300px]` properly clips content within the Radix UI viewport,
preventing expanded artifact text from overlapping the next artifact
header

## Test plan
- [ ] Open a session with multiple artifacts
- [ ] Expand an artifact with long content
- [ ] Verify content scrolls within its 300px container and does not
overlap the next artifact header

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
PC: navegación de fechas instantánea — toggles sin re-render, pre-carga paralela de archivos

- toggleMonth ya no llama renderDetailView: renderiza solo ese mes inline (renderMonthDates)
- toggleDateSection: si archivos ya pre-cargados, los muestra inmediatamente sin network
- preloadMonthFiles: al abrir un mes, pre-carga TODAS las fechas del mes en paralelo (3 workers)
  → cuando el usuario clickea una fecha, los datos ya están listos
- Al abrir detalle de trabajador, pre-carga todo el primer mes automáticamente
- Resultado: navegar fechas es instantáneo en vez de esperar network por cada click

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enable real SSR — remove AuthProvider render-blocking + add Suspense boundaries

Root cause: AuthProvider returned null during SSR because isHydrated
(set via useEffect) is always false on the server. This caused the
entire page tree to render as empty HTML — only 'Skip to content'
was visible to crawlers and search engines.

Fix:
- Remove 'if (!isHydrated) return null' guard in AuthProvider
- Add Suspense boundaries around components using useSearchParams()
- Extract client pages (login, waitlist, accept-invite, checkout) into
  separate Client files with Server Component wrappers for Suspense

Verified: built HTML now contains 3,241+ chars of real page content
including nav, footer, and full page body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
